subcodes.first_line: Strive thou, lest thou remain deprived and bereft of that which is with God. All the peoples of the earth await and yearn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جهد نما تا از ما عند الله محروم و بی نصیب نمانی جمیع اهل ارض منتظر و از حق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @development of capacity and readiness
